title: SUCCESS: Diagnosed MacBook Pro slug/freeze (load peaked at 294), cleaned stale agents and Jest tests, broadened runaway guard...
content: Approach: Diagnosed MacBook Pro slug/freeze (load peaked at 294), cleaned stale agents and Jest tests, broadened runaway guard patterns in sim-runaway-guard.sh, and added try-catch to tests/test-mac-text-hotkeys-config.js to handle sandbox EPERM.
